subject: [PATCH v6 03/22] mm: swap: add an abstract API for locking out swapoff

2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch introduces an abstract API to lock out swapoff operations in the Linux kernel. The current implementation of locking out swapoff relies on getting a reference to the backing swap device, which is not suitable for virtual swap designs where the swap entry may not have a backing device or its backend can change during its lifetime. The new API, provided by two inline functions `tryget_swap_entry` and `put_swap_entry`, allows for generic locking out of swapoff operations without requiring knowledge of the underlying swap device. This patch modifies several kernel files to use this new API, ensuring that swapoff is properly locked out in various scenarios.
